latestCycle.goal: clear the mature Andes windward-parity blocker by tightening the coupled lee no-delivery and warm-rain suppression defaults without breaking Rockies or Himalaya-Tibet windward favorability
latestCycle.verifiedImprovement: the coupled lee rain-retention gate in src/weather/v2/vertical5.js, src/weather/v2/microphysics5.js, and src/weather/v2/core5.js pushed the audited Andes mature-window precipRatio from 0.9759 to 1.0899 at 105480 while preserving windward-favored Rockies and Himalaya-Tibet behavior, and the targeted validation suite still passed

blockingGaps: the newest planetary quick audit says the dominant blocker is now broad circulation and moisture-belt realism, not Andes parity: trades are missing in both hemispheres, southern westerlies are weak, and the northern subtropical dry belt is too wet

broader Earth-like realism still needs fresh multi-day and seasonal re-audits in the live app and headless path with the new terrain-coupled lee drying active across circulation, clouds, storms, and precipitation placement
orographic realism improved enough that it should not monopolize the worker; terrain-only tuning should stay secondary unless a fresh planetary audit ranks it first again
runtime smoothness is still not signed off; the latest live run now has healthy telemetry and still reports earth_update_p95_high, earth_update_max_high, and wind_targets_failing
the live browser path is functional, but the console still emits repeated THREE.WebGLRenderer texture-update warnings
world-class status still requires realism and smoothness to pass in the same fresh live run
cycleInputs: latest runtime summary from npm run agent:summarize-runtime-log

correct the northern subtropical dry-belt moisture partitioning and ITCZ-adjacent hydrology with a broad circulation/moisture cycle
run the seasonal planetary audit after the first successful broad-circulation fix so seasonality and storm organization stop being inferred from mountain-only proxies
